reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Lugar de paso casi obligado cuando se va de Córdoba a Santiago del Estero. Los findes se suele formar cola bastante larga. Tiene habitaciones para dormir.

(Translated by Google)
A near-obligatory stop when traveling from Córdoba to Santiago del Estero. There's usually a long queue on weekends. It has rooms available for overnight stays.

reviews.comment:
El servicio de la cafetería es bueno lo que le juega en contra es la falta de personal a la hora de cargar nafta siempre hay largas colas

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria service is good, but the lack of staff at the gas station is a drawback; there are always long lines.
